description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named mingw-native that runs on every push to any branch, on every pull request to any branch, and on a scheduled cron job at 00:16 on Wednesday and Saturday. Use a single windows-2022 job with bash shell, checking the GCC version, then checking out the repository, setting up Python 3.x, installing Conan, installing Boost, configuring a CMake build with MinGW Makefiles, building in parallel, and running tests with CTest.
